t1	passed	0.97	Maps to copies then sorts asc + reverse = descending; input not mutated
t2	passed	0.92	Sorts by start, merges overlaps (s<last[1]), copies input
t3	passed	0.95	Math.round satisfies nearest-int rounding incl. negative case
t4	passed	0.97	Coerces via String, returns unchanged if <=max else slices first max
t5	gaps_found	0.85	Never sorts output by start (must_have 2); preserves input order
t6	gaps_found	0.6	Extra target[key]===null clause overwrites a present null key, violates must_have 3
t7	passed	0.98	Wraps text in ** delimiters exactly
